definition_long: Observable environmental attribute where Blue-space is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.

Measured tactile property: Haptic Fractal Dimension as reported by material or haptic data rather than visual appearance. This tag should only be used when measurement, sensing, or metadata supports Haptic Fractal Dimension, not from visual inference. For 2D/3D imagery alone, do not assign without corroborating data.

Measured tactile property: Hardness Rating as reported by material or haptic data rather than visual appearance. This tag should only be used when measurement, sensing, or metadata supports Hardness Rating, not from visual inference. For 2D/3D imagery alone, do not assign without corroborating data.

Measured tactile property: Surface Roughness Spectrum Slope as reported by material or haptic data rather than visual appearance. This tag should only be used when measurement, sensing, or metadata supports Surface Roughness Spectrum Slope, not from visual inference. For 2D/3D imagery alone, do not assign without corroborating data.
